## Collector test failure

### Test lane
- [ ] Local workstation test
- [ ] Elastic response action
- [ ] Gemini-guided workflow
- [ ] Other

### Command or step used
Paste the exact command or instruction used.

### Actual result
Paste the error, output, or observed behavior.

### Expected result
Describe what should have happened.

### Environment
Describe OS, PowerShell version, Elastic context, or other relevant setup.

### Evidence
Attach screenshots, logs, output files, or links.

### Blocking level
- [ ] Blocks all collector testing
- [ ] Blocks one collector path
- [ ] Non-blocking but confusing
- [ ] Documentation-only issue

### Recommended next action
Describe the likely fix or next test.
